name: Irish Lambpot
recipeIngredient: 29 oz lamb shoulder, cut into 3 cm pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the lamb in a pot and cover with water. Season with salt and pepper. Cover and simmer for 20 minutes.
2. Add the vegetables, garlic, and potatoes. Simmer another 25-30 minutes covered.
3. Season with oregano and serve.
